name: notification-stack
title: Notification Stack
description: 1 to 5 token notification cards slide-settle into a vertical stack on cues, newest on top; one card grows slightly and brightens as the focus while the rest dim by position.
evidence: Wave J J2-9: product-demo notification unit per the Wave J2 shelf expansion

variables.label: Bodies
variables.description: Comma-separated body lines matched to titles by index. Blank entries hide that body line.
variables.default: Pipeline started for main,All 42 checks green,Now serving version 2.4

variables.label: Expand
variables.description: Index of the focus card in the titles list. -1 focuses the newest card (top of the stack).

variables.label: Cues
variables.description: Comma-separated per-card arrival times in seconds. Blank entries use the default rhythm.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Accent token family used by the icon dots.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: How the stack leaves the frame. Default none: the hold ends the film.
